pageMeta.chat_desc: View sessions, messages and execution traces via the built-in web channel.
pageMeta.sessions_desc: Browse, view and manage all session history by Channel or Agent.
pageMeta.agents_desc: Manage agent details, configurations and capabilities.
pageMeta.channels_desc: Manage running status and configuration for web, Feishu, and other channels.
pageMeta.providers_desc: Manage provider instances, dependencies and sensitive configuration.
pageMeta.mcp_desc: Manage MCP server configuration, connection status and tool loading.
pageMeta.skills_desc: Manage builtin and workspace skill packages, upload and view skill details.
pageMeta.status_desc: View system runtime status, channel online status and resource summary.
pageMeta.cron_desc: Manage scheduled jobs with every / cron / at scheduling modes.
pageMeta.settings_desc: Manage Heartbeat, Cron schedule configuration and console password.

auth.firstTime: First time? Please set an access password
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired, please re-enter your password
auth.networkError: Authentication failed, please check your network connection

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete session {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
sessions.selectSessionHint: Click a session from the left list to view its messages and details.

chat.webChannelHint: web channel | events shown in right timeline
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message to start an agent run…
chat.sessionDetailsHint: Shows current agent, provider, model and event timeline
chat.timelineEmpty: After sending a message, the `thinking`, `tool_call` and `tool_result` timeline will appear here.
chat.startNewHint: Select an existing session from the left, or click `New Chat` in the Sessions panel to create one. Messages and events will appear after sending.
chat.deleteSessionConfirmDesc: Deleting will remove the chat history and cannot be undone.
chat.noMatchSessions: No matching sessions. Try clearing the search or creating a new chat session.

agents.description: Manage agent instance configuration, including model, provider binding, and memory window parameters.
agents.emptyNoConfig: No agents configured. Click the button above to add one.
agents.emptyNoMatch: No matching agents. Try adjusting the search.
agents.newAgentDesc: Fill in the agent identifier, model and provider binding configuration.
agents.deleteConfirmDesc: This agent's configuration and workspace directory will be permanently removed.
agents.builtinCannotDelete: This is a builtin agent and cannot be deleted.
agents.usedByChannelsWarning: This agent is referenced by the following channels and deletion will be rejected:
agents.selectAgentDesc: Select an agent from the left list to view details, or click the button above to create a new one.

channels.description: Manage multi-channel configuration. `web` is the built-in conversation channel; other channel types can be dynamically added and managed via API.
channels.addChannelDesc: Select channel type and fill in configuration. It will start automatically after completion.
channels.builtinCannotDelete: This is a builtin channel and cannot be deleted.
channels.deleteConfirmDesc: This channel will be stopped and its configuration will be permanently removed.
channels.emptyNoConfig: No channels configured. Click the button above to add one.
channels.emptyNoMatch: No matching channels. Try adjusting the search.
channels.selectChannelDesc: Select a channel from the left list to view details, or click the button above to create a new one.

providers.addProviderDesc: Select provider type and fill in required configuration.
providers.noSettings: This provider type has no configuration fields.
providers.deleteConfirmDesc: This provider's configuration will be permanently removed.
providers.usedByAgentsWarning: This provider is referenced by the following agents and deletion will be rejected:
providers.emptyNoConfig: No providers configured. Click the button above to add one.
providers.emptyNoMatch: No matching providers. Try adjusting the search.
providers.selectProviderDesc: Select a provider from the left list to view details, or click the button above to add a new one.

cron.name: Name
cron.deliverModeDesc: When enabled, deliver message to the specified Channel
cron.deleteAfterRunDesc: Automatically delete this job after execution
cron.selectJobHint: Select from the left list to view details and execution records

mcp.emptyNoConfig: No MCP servers configured. Click the button above to add one.
mcp.emptyNoMatch: No matching servers. Try adjusting the search.
mcp.addServerDesc: Configure Stdio or SSE mode MCP server connection.
mcp.toolsWillUnloadWarning: This server has {{count}} loaded tools. They will all be unloaded after deletion.
mcp.deleteConfirmDesc: This server's configuration will be permanently removed and loaded tools will be unloaded.
mcp.kvEmpty: No configuration. Click the button above to add.
mcp.loadingServerDesc: Loading MCP server configuration from backend.
mcp.selectServerDesc: Select a server from the left list to view details, or click above to add a new one.

skills.emptyPublic: No public skills. Click the button above to upload.
skills.emptyAgent: Agent "{{name}}" has no skills. Click the button above to upload.
skills.emptyNoMatch: No matching skills. Try adjusting the search.
skills.uploadDesc: Upload a .zip file containing SKILL.md, max 50 MB.
skills.dropzone: Drag a .zip file here, or click to select
skills.deleteConfirmDesc: The skill folder will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
skills.selectSkillDesc: Select a skill from the left list to view details, or click above to upload a new skill package.

status.description: View app, agent loop, heartbeat, channels, MCP and resource summary.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The current route has no corresponding page. You can navigate back to an available page from the left sidebar.
